text: et asher haya merosh asher shama'enu uve'eyneynu rainu asher hibatenu vaasher mishashu yadeynu 'al-devar hachayim
vehachayim nigelu vanere ume'idim anachenu umodi'im lakhem et-chayey ha'olamim asher hayu 'im-haav venigelu lanu
et asher rainu veshama'enu nodi'a lakhem lema'an titechaberu lanu gam-atem venitechabarenu 'im-haav ve'im-beno yeshu'a hamashicha
vezot kotevim anachenu lakhem lema'an tiheye simechatekhem shelema
vezot hashemu'a asher shama'enu mimenu vanaged lakhem shehaelohim or hu vekhal-choshekh eyn bo
im-nomar ki yesh-lanu hitechaberut 'imo venitehalekh bachoshekh doverey sheqer anachenu velo po'aley haemet
aval im-nitehalekh baor kaasher hu vaor hine nitechabarenu yachad vedam-yeshu'a hamashicha beno yetaharenu mikal-chete
im-nomar sheeyn-banu chete mate'im anachenu nafeshenu vehaemet eyn banu
veim-nitevade et-chatoteynu neeman hu vetsadiq liselocha lechatoteynu uletaharenu mikal-'aon
veim-nomar shel chatanu lekhozev nesimenu udevaro eyn banu
banay hineni khotev aleykhem et-hadevarim haele levileti techetau veim-yecheta ish yesh-lanu lifeney avinu melits yeshu'a hamashicha hatsadiq
vehu kapara 'al-chatoteynu velo 'al-chatoteynu vilevad ki gam-'al-chatot kal-ha'olam
uvazot neda' ki hikarenu oto im-nishemor et-mitseotayv
haomer hikaretiv veet-mitseotayv lo yishemor dover sheqer hu vehaemet eyn bo
aval hashomer et-devaro bo nishelema veemet ahavat elohim uvazot neda' ki-vo anachenu
haomer shehu 'omed bo kaasher hitehalekh hu ken yitehalakh
achay lo mitseva chadasha kotev ani lakhem ki im-mitseva yeshana asher hayeta lakhem merosh vehamitseva hayeshana hi hadavar asher shema'etem
ve'od mitseva chadasha ani khotev lakhem vehi neemana gam-bo gam-bakhem mipeney shehachoshekh 'over vehaor haamiti kevar zarach
haomer baor ani vehu sne et-achiv 'odenu bachoshekh
haohev et-achiv 'omed baor umikheshol eyn bo
vehasne et-achiv bachoshekh hu uvachoshekh yitehalekh velo yeda' ana hu holekh ki hachoshekh 'iver et-'eynayv
hineni khotev aleykhem habanim ya'an ki-niselechu lakhem chatoteykhem lema'an shemo
kotev ani aleykhem haavot ya'an ki hikaretem et asher-merosh kotev ani aleykhem habachurim ya'an ki hitegabaretem 'al-hara' kataveti aleykhem hayeladim ya'an ki-hikaretem et-haav
kataveti aleykhem haavot ya'an ki hikaretem et asher-merosh kataveti aleykhem habachurim ya'an ki-chazaqetem udevar haelohim shokhen beqirebekhem vehitegabaretem 'al-hara'
al teehavu et-ha'olam veet-diverey ha'olam ish ki-yeehav et-ha'olam eyn-bo ahavat haav
ki kol asher ba'olam chesheq habasar vetaavat ha'eynayim vegeut hanekhasim lo min-avinu hu ki im-min-ha'olam
veha'olam 'avor ya'avor 'im-taaotayv veha'ose retson elohim ya'amod la'ad
yeladay hine hasha'a haacharona baa vekhaasher shema'etem sheyavo sten hamashicha ken 'ata rabu steney hamashicha uvazot neda' shehi hasha'a haacharona
miqirebenu yatseu aval lo-meitanu hayu ki lu hayu meitanu ki az hayu 'omedim 'imanu akh yatseu lema'an yivada' ki lo khulam meitanu hema
veatem lakhem hamishecha meet haqadosh vida'etem hakol
lo khataveti aleykhem mipeney shel-yeda'etem et-haemet ki-yeda'etem otah vida'etem shekal-devar sheqer lo min-haemet hu
mi hu hadover sheqer ki im-hamekhachesh beyeshu'a lemor lo hamashicha hu ze hu soten hamashicha hamekhachesh baav uvaben
kal-hamekhachesh baben gam-haav eyn-lo vehamode vaben lo gam-haav
veatem yaqam-na vakhem hadavar asher shema'etem merosh veim-yaqum bakhem asher shema'etem merosh gam-atem taqumu baben uvaav
vehahavetacha asher hivetichanu hi chayey ha'olamim
zot kataveti aleykhem mipeney hamate'im etekhem

veatem hamishecha asher qibaletem meito 'omedet bakhem velo titsetarakhu leish sheyelamed etekhem ki im-kaasher telamedekhem hamishecha lekhal-davar hu haemet velo sheqer vekhaasher limeda etekhem ken ta'amedu vo
ve'ata vanim 'imedu vo lema'an yeemats libenu beheraoto velo-nevosh mipanayv bevoo
im-yeda'etem ki-tsadiq hu de'u-na ki kal-'ose tsedaqa nolad mimenu
reu mah-gadela ahavat haav asher natan lanu lehiqare beney haelohim uvanayv anachenu 'al-ken ha'olam eynenu yode'a otanu ya'an ki-oto lo yada'
yediday 'ata banim lelohim anachenu ve'od lo nigela mah-niheye aval yada'enu ki vehigaloto niheye domim-lo ki nireehu kemo shehu
vekhal-asher lo hatiqeva hazot yetaher et-'atsemo kaasher tahor gam-hu
kal-chote poshe'a batora hu vehachete peshi'a vatora
vida'etem ki hu nigela laset et-chataeynu uvo eyn chete
kal-ha'omed bo lo yecheta kal-hachote lo raahu af-lo yeda'o
banay al-yate'e etekhem ish ha'ose tsedaqa tsadiq hu kaasher hu tsadiq
vehachote min-hasatan hu ki hasatan rishon lachoteim uva'avur zot nigela ven-haelohim lehafer et-pe'ulot hasatan
kal-hanolad meelohim lo yecheta ki zare'o bo yishaer velo yukhal lachato ki meelohim nolad
uvazot node'u beney haelohim uveney hasatan kal-ish asher lo-ya'ase tsedaqa eynenu meelohim vekhen kal-asher lo-yeehav et-achiv
ki zot hashemu'a asher shema'etem merosh leahava ish et-re'ehu
lo kheqayin asher haya min-hara' veharag et-achiv umadu'a harago ya'an ki-ma'asayv hayu ra'im uma'asey achiv ma'asey-tsedeq
al-titemehu echay im-yisena etekhem ha'olam
anachenu yada'enu ki 'avarenu min-hamavet el-hachayim baasher ahavenu et-acheynu ish asher lo-yeehav yishaer bamavet
kal-hasne et achiv rotsecha hu vida'etem ki khal-rotsecha lo yiteqayemu-vo chayey 'olam
bazot yada'enu et-haahava ki hu natan et-nafesho ba'adenu gam-anachenu chayavim latet et-nafeshoteynu be'ad acheynu
veish asher-lo nikhesey ha'olam haze vehu roe et-achiv chasar-lechem veqofets et-rachamayv mimenu eykh ta'amad-bo ahavat elohim
banay al-na neehav bemilin uvalashon ki im-befo'al uveemet
uvazot nede'a ki min-haemet anachenu ulefanayv nasheqit et-liboteynu
ki im-libenu yareshi'a otanu haelohim nisegav hu milibenu veyode'a et-kol
yediday im-libenu lo-yareshi'enu 'oz lanu belohim
vekhal-asher nisheal meito yinaten-lanu ki-nishemor et-mitseotayv vena'ase et-hayashar be'eynayv
vezot mitsevato lehaamin beshem-beno yeshu'a hamashicha uleahava ish et-re'ehu kaasher tsivanu
vehashomer et-mitseotayv yaqum bo vehu vo uvazot neda' ki-hu shokhen banu barucha asher-natan lanu
yediday al-taaminu lekhal-rucha ki im-bachanu haruchot im-meelohim hema ki neviey sheqer rabim bau la'olam
bazot takiru et-rucha elohim kal-rucha hamode beyeshu'a hamashicha haba vabasar meelohim hu
vekhal-rucha asher eynenu mode beyeshu'a hamashicha haba vabasar lo meelohim hu veze hu rucha soten hamashicha asher shema'etem ki-yavo ve'ata hineh-hu va'olam
atem habanim meelohim atem venitsachetem otam ki-asher bakhem gadol hu measher ba'olam
hema min-ha'olam 'al-ken meha'olam yedaberu veha'olam yishema' aleyhem
vaanachenu meelohim hayode'a et-haelohim yishema' eleynu vaasher eynenu meelohim lo yishema' eleynu bazot nakir et-rucha haemet veet-rucha hato'a
yediday neehav-na ish et-re'ehu ki haahava meelohim hi vekhal-asher yeehav nolad meelohim veyode'a et haelohim
vaasher eynenu ohev lo yada' et-haelohim ki haelohim hu ahava
bazot nireata ahavat haelohim lanu asher-shalach haelohim et-beno et-yechido la'olam lema'an nicheye 'al-yado
zot hi haahava lo sheanachenu ahavenu et-haelohim ki im-hu ahav otanu vayishelach et-beno lekhapara 'al-chatoteynu
yediday im-kakha ahav otanu haelohim gam-anachenu chayavim leahava ish et-re'ehu
et-haelohim lo-raa ish me'olam veim-neehav ish et-re'ehu haelohim ya'amod beqirebenu veahavato nishelemah-banu
bazot neda' asher-bo nishekon vehu vanu ki-natan lanu merucho
vaanachenu chazinu vana'ida ki haav shalach et-haben moshi'a ha'olam
kal-hamode ki yeshu'a hu ven-haelohim haelohim shokhen bo vehu belohim
vaanachenu yada'enu vanaamen baahava asher elohim ahav otanu haelohim hu ahava veha'omed baahava 'omed belohim vehaelohim 'omed bo
uvazot nishelemah-banu haahava biheyot lanu pitechon pe leyom hadin ki khamohu ken gam-anachenu ba'olam haze
eyn pachad laahava ki haahava hashelema tegaresh et-hapachad ki hapachad hu fachad min-ha'onesh vehamefached eynenu shalem baahava
anachenu ohavim oto ki hu qidem leahava otanu
ki-yomar ish ohev ani et-haelohim vehu sone et-achiv sheqer hu medaber ki asher lo yeehav et-achiv asher hu roe eykhakha yukhal leehov et-haelohim asher hu eynenu roe oto
vezot hamitseva meito lanu ki haohev et-haelohim yeehav gam-et-achiv
kal-hamaamin ki yeshu'a hu hamashicha hu nolad meelohim vekhal-haohev et-molido yeehav gam et-hanolad meito
bezot neda' ki neehav et-beney haelohim beahavatenu et-haelohim uveshamerenu et-mitseotayv
ki zot ahavat elohim asher nishemor et-mitseotayv umitseotayv bileti qashot hena
ki-khol hanolad meet haelohim menatsecha et-ha'olam veemunatenu hi hanitsachon hamenatsecha et-ha'olam
mi hamenatsecha et-ha'olam ki im-hamaamin beyeshu'a shehu ben-haelohim
ze hu asher-ba bemayim uvedam uverucha yeshu'a hamashicha lo bemayim bilevad ki im-bamayim uvadam veharucha hu hame'id ki harucha hu haemet
ki shelosha hame'idim bashamayim haav hadavar verucha haqodesh ushelashetam echad hema
ushelosha hema hame'idim baarets harucha hamayim vehadam ushelashetam 'edut echat
hen-neqabel 'edut beney adam ve'edut haelohim halo gedola mimena ki zot hi 'edut haelohim asher he'id 'al-beno
hamaamin beven-haelohim yesh-lo 'edut benafesho vaasher lo yaamin lelohim lekhozev samahu ya'an lo-heemin ba'edut asher he'id haelohim 'al-beno
vezot hi ha'edut ki chayey 'olam natan lanu haelohim vehachayim haele biveno hema
asher yesh-lo haben yesh-lo hachayim vaasher eyn-lo ben-haelohim eyn lo hachayim
zot kataveti aleykhem lema'an tede'un shechayey 'olam lakhem hamaaminim beshem ben-haelohim
uvitechonenu vo sheim-nisheal davar kiretsono yishema' beqolenu
ulefi sheyode'im anachenu ki yishema' beqolenu lekhal-asher nisheal neda' gam-zot ki hu memale mishealoteynu
ish ki-yiree et-achiv chote chatat asher eynena lamavet shaol yisheal ba'ado veyiten-lo chayim lekhal-asher chateu velo lamavet hen-yesh chete mavet 'al-ze lo omar lisheol ba'ado
kal-ma'ase 'avel chete hi veyesh chatat asher eynenah lamavet
yada'enu ki khal-hanolad meet haelohim lo yecheta ki asher yulad meet haelohim yishemor et-nafesho vehara' lo-yiga' bo
yada'enu ki meelohim anachenu vekhal-ha'olam bera' hu
veyada'enu ki va ben-elohim vayiten-lanu vina lada'at et-haamiti uvaamiti anachenu biveno yeshu'a hamashicha ze hu hael haamiti vechayey ha'olamim
banay hishameru lakhem min-haelilim amen ﻿
